description: Measurement or fact records aligned with the Darwin Core MeasurementOrFact class. Links to an occurrence via occurrenceRef. Supports three paths: floraMeasurement (typed fields for sessile organisms like trees, plants, corals), faunaMeasurement (typed fields for mobile organisms like mammals, birds, reptiles, fish), and genericMeasurement (flexible key-value array for anything else). All three paths bundle multiple measurements into a single record per occurrence, reducing PDS storage compared to one-record-per-measurement.

main.description: A bundle of measurements, facts, or characteristics about an occurrence. One record per occurrence, with all measurements grouped inside a typed result union.

occurrenceRef.description: AT-URI reference to the app.gainforest.dwc.occurrence record these measurements belong to.

occurrenceID.description: The occurrenceID of the linked occurrence record (for cross-system interoperability with GBIF/DwC-A exports).

result.description: The typed measurement payload. Use floraMeasurement for sessile organisms (trees, plants, corals, sponges), faunaMeasurement for mobile organisms (mammals, birds, reptiles, amphibians, fish, insects), or genericMeasurement as a flexible fallback.

measuredBy.description: Person(s) who performed the measurements. Pipe-delimited for multiple.

measuredByID.description: ORCID or other persistent identifier(s) for the measurer(s). Pipe-delimited for multiple.

measurementDate.description: Date the measurements were taken. ISO 8601 format.

measurementMethod.description: General protocol or method used (e.g., 'ForestGEO standard protocol', 'mist-net examination').

measurementRemarks.description: Comments or notes about the measurement session.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of record creation in the ATProto PDS.

floraMeasurement.description: Typed measurements for sessile organisms: trees, woody plants, herbs, grasses, corals, sponges, lichens, and other non-mobile life forms. All numeric values stored as strings. Field descriptions include expected units for DwC-A export mapping.

dbh.description: Diameter at breast height in centimeters. The core measurement in all tree inventories (ForestGEO, NFI, RAINFOR).

dbhMeasurementHeight.description: Height above ground where DBH was measured, in meters. Important when measured above buttress or irregularity. Default is 1.3m.

girth.description: Circumference of trunk at breast height in centimeters. Alternative to DBH (convertible via pi).

basalDiameter.description: Diameter at ground level or just above root flare in centimeters. Standard for shrubs and multi-stemmed plants.

basalArea.description: Cross-sectional area of trunk at breast height in square centimeters.

stemCount.description: Number of stems for multi-stemmed individuals.

totalHeight.description: Total height from ground to highest living point in meters.

heightToFirstBranch.description: Height from ground to first major living branch (bole length) in meters.

buttressHeight.description: Height of buttress roots above ground in meters. Common in tropical trees.

crownDiameter.description: Average crown diameter in meters (typically mean of multiple radial measurements).

crownDepth.description: Vertical extent of crown in meters (total height minus height to crown base).

canopyCoverPercent.description: Percentage of ground covered by the canopy of this individual.

abovegroundBiomass.description: Estimated aboveground biomass in kilograms, derived from allometric equations.

carbonContent.description: Estimated carbon stored in kilograms of carbon (typically 47-50% of dry biomass).

woodDensity.description: Specific gravity of wood (dry mass / green volume) in grams per cubic centimeter.

biomassAllometricEquation.description: Reference to the allometric equation used for biomass estimation (e.g., 'Chave et al. 2014').

annualDiameterIncrement.description: Annual radial growth measured via dendrometer bands or core samples in millimeters per year.

estimatedAge.description: Estimated age of the organism in years (from rings, radiocarbon, or allometry).

growthForm.description: Growth form classification of the organism.

vitalityStatus.description: Overall vitality status of the organism.

healthScore.description: Numeric health or vigor score (protocol-dependent scale).

damageType.description: Type of damage observed (e.g., 'broken crown', 'leaning', 'uprooted', 'hollow', 'scarred', 'stripped bark').

decayClass.description: Decay classification for dead trees (1-5 scale per ForestGEO/FIA protocols).

leafAreaIndex.description: Leaf area index: total one-sided leaf area per unit ground area (m²/m²).

colonyDiameter.description: Maximum colony diameter in centimeters (corals, sponges).

colonyHeight.description: Height of colony from base to apex in centimeters.

liveTissueCoverPercent.description: Percentage of colony surface with live tissue.

depthBelowSurface.description: Depth of the organism below water surface in meters.

additionalMeasurements.description: Additional measurements not covered by the typed fields above.

faunaMeasurement.description: Typed measurements for mobile organisms: mammals, birds, reptiles, amphibians, fish, insects, and other animals. Covers morphometrics, health assessments, reproductive measurements, and individual marking data. All numeric values stored as strings. Field descriptions include expected units for DwC-A export mapping.

totalLength.description: Total body length in millimeters (tip of snout/bill to tail tip).

headBodyLength.description: Head-body length excluding tail in millimeters.

wingLength.description: Flattened wing chord length in millimeters (birds).

wingspan.description: Full wingspan tip-to-tip in millimeters (birds, bats).

billDepth.description: Depth of bill at base or gonys in millimeters (birds).

fatScore.description: Subcutaneous fat deposit score (0-8 scale, birds).

earLength.description: Ear length from notch to tip in millimeters (mammals).

forearmLength.description: Forearm length in millimeters. Standard measurement for bats.

shoulderHeight.description: Height at shoulder in millimeters (large mammals).

snoutVentLength.description: Snout-vent length (SVL) in millimeters. Standard body measurement for reptiles and amphibians.

standardLength.description: Standard length (snout to caudal fin base) in millimeters (fish).

forkLength.description: Fork length (snout to fork of caudal fin) in millimeters (fish).

groupSize.description: Total size of social group observed (herd, flock, pod, colony).

clutchSize.description: Number of eggs in nest (birds, reptiles).

nestHeight.description: Height of nest above ground in meters.

bodyConditionScore.description: Standardized body condition score (scale varies by taxon: 1-5 or 1-9).

bodyConditionIndex.description: Calculated condition index (mass/length ratio or regression residual).

injuryDescription.description: Description of injuries (scars, wounds, missing limbs, broken wing).

diseaseSignsPresent.description: Whether signs of disease are visible.

diseaseDescription.description: Description of disease signs (mange, lesions, tumors, fungal infection, avian pox, chytrid).

tagId.description: Ear tag, flipper tag, fin tag, or wing tag identifier.

tagType.description: Type of tag or mark applied.

colorBandCombination.description: Description of color band arrangement (e.g., 'Red/White left, Blue/Metal right').

recaptureStatus.description: Whether this is a new capture or recapture.

markDescription.description: Description of natural marks, scars, or unique identifying features.

geneticSampleId.description: Identifier of tissue, hair, or feather sample collected for genetic analysis.

additionalMeasurements.description: Additional measurements not covered by the typed fields above.

genericMeasurement.description: Flexible measurement container for organisms that do not fit the flora/fauna split, or for legacy compatibility. Contains an array of key-value measurement entries.

measurements.description: Array of individual measurements, each with type, value, and optional unit.

measurementEntry.description: A single measurement fact, aligned with one row of the Darwin Core MeasurementOrFact extension. Used in additionalMeasurements arrays and in genericMeasurement.

measurementType.description: The nature of the measurement (e.g., 'DBH', 'tree height', 'canopy cover', 'tail length', 'soil pH').

measurementUnit.description: The units for the value (e.g., 'cm', 'm', 'kg', '%', 'degrees Celsius').

measurementMethod.description: Method or instrument used to determine this specific measurement.
